title: 1 FEN = 0.1 CUN
text:
11.17
木穴
MÙ XUÉ
WOOD POINT
On the proximal phalanx of the
index finger, from the median
line, establish a line 4 fen to the
ulnar side. Divide this line in three
parts; the points are located at the
distances 1/3 and 2/3.
Location
• Liver fire effulgence;
• Common cold;
• Great point for people who get
easily angered and have a short
temper.
Indications
Reaction area
of the liver
This is a 2 point unit!
Needle 0.5–1 fen in depth.
Manipulation
1/3 1/3 1/3
11.17
MEDIAN
LINE
31
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
STOPS RUNNING NOSE
IMMEDIATELY FOR
COMMON COLD!
11.24
婦科
FÙ KĒ
WOMAN’S SPECIALTY
This is a 2 point unit
On the proximal phalanx of the
thumb, at the “lighter/darker”
division line to the ulnar side. Divide
the phalanx in three parts, the points
are located at the distances 1/3 and
2/3.
Location
Combine with
11.06 – 還巢 HUÁN CHÁO
on the opposite hand
Needle 2 fen in depth. Both
points simultaneously.
Manipulation
• Uterine pain;
• Irregular menstruation;
• Menstrual pain;
• Lower abdominal distension;
• Excessive or scanty menstruation.
Indications
Reaction area
of the uterus
1/3
1/3
1/3
11.24
32
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
VERY EFFECTIVE POINT
FOR FEMALE DISEASES!
11.27
五虎
WǓ HǓ
FIVE TIGERS
This is a 5 point unit
On the proximal phalanx of the
thumb, at the “lighter/darker”
division line to the radial side. Divide
the phalanx in six parts, the points
are located at the distances 1/6, 2/6,
3/6, 4/6 and 5/6.
Location
• Head pain;
• Foot pain;
• Hand pain;
• Swollen joints and bones.
Indications
Reaction area
of the spleen
Needle 2 fen in depth.
Manipulation
WU HU 1 - FINGER
PAIN, TENOSYNOVITIS,
ARTHRITIS, HEADACHE
WU HU 3 - TOE PAIN AND
HEADACHE
WU HU 4 - ANKLE AND
DORSUM OF FOOT PAIN
WU HU 5 - HEEL PAIN
Divide in
6 equal
parts
11.27
33
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
ON THE
LUNG
CHANNEL
WU HU 2 SERVES
AS A DAO MA
POINT FOR WU HU 1
AND WU HU 3!
DO NOT NEEDLE
ALL 5 POINTS AT
THE SAME TIME.
NEEDLE
ACCORDING TO
THE SYMPTOMS.
THIS IS A GREAT
HOLOGRAPHIC
IMAGE EXAMPLE,
WHERE THE
WHOLE BODY,
FROM TOP TO
BOTTOM, IS
REPRESENTED IN
THIS AREA.
WU HU 1
WU HU 2
WU HU 3
WU HU 4
WU HU 5
22.01
重子
CHÓNG ZǏ
DOUBLE CHILD
On the palmar surface of the
hand, find the thenar eminence
and measure 1 cun proximal from
the skin fold between the first and
second metacarpals.
Location
Combine with
22.02 – 重仙 CHÓNG XIĀN
Needle 3–5 fen in depth.
Manipulation
22.01
22.02
• Upper back, shoulder and scapular
pain;
• Common cold.
Indications
34
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
ESPECIALLY EFFECTIVE
FOR PNEUMONIA.
22.02
重仙
CHÓNG XIĀN
DOUBLE IMMORTAL
• Same as 22.01;
• Fever;
• Heart palpitations;
• Knee pain;
• Plantar fasciitis.
Indications
On the palmar surface of the hand,
on the joint between the first and
second metacarpals.
Location
Combine with
22.01 – 重子 CHÓNG ZǏ
Needle 3–5 fen in depth.
Manipulation
22.02
22.01
35
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
VERY EFFECTIVE
FOR SHOULDER AND
SCAPULAR PAIN!
22.04
大白
DÀ BÁI
GREAT WHITE
Reaction area
of the lungs
Needling is forbiden in
pregnant women.
22.04
LI4
22.05
When a loose fist is
made, this point is on
the radial side of the
index finger, in the
depression proximal
to the metacarpo-
phalangeal joint. Insert
the needle just above
the tendon toward the
palm of the hand.
Located at LI3 (三間,
SĀN JIĀN).
Location
Combine with
22.05 – 靈骨 LÍNG GǓ
Needle 5 fen in depth.
Manipulation
• Sciatic pain;
• Childhood asthma.
Indications
36
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
BLEEDING IS VERY
EFFECTIVE FOR
HIGH FEVER
THIS COMBINATION
TREATS MANY DISEASES
BY SUPPLEMENTING QI
22.05
靈骨
LÍNG GǓ
SPIRIT BONE
Reaction area
of the lungs
Needling is forbiden in
pregnant women.
22.05
22.04
LI4
• Sciatic pain;
• Lower limb and low back pain;
• Tinnitus and dizziness;
• Intestinal pain;
• Menstrual pain and irregularity;
• Migraine.
Indications
At the joint of the
first and second
metacarpals on the
dorsal surface of
the hand. Slightly
proximal to LI4 (合谷,
HÉ GǓ).
Location
Combine with
22.04 – 大白 DÀ BÁI
Needle 1 cun in depth.
Manipulation
37
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
THE TWO POINTS TREAT
DISEASES OF ALL THE 5
ZANG IN GENERAL.
22.06
中白
ZHŌNG BÁI
MIDDLE WHITE
22.06
22.07
Reaction area
of the kidneys
When the patient’s hand is folded
into a fist, the point is located on the
dorsum of the hand, 5 fen proximal
to the web between the fourth and
fifth metacarpals.
Location
Combine with
22.07 – 下白 XIÀ BÁI
Needle 3–5 fen in depth.
Manipulation
• Dizziness;
• Sciatic pain;
• Swelling and edema of the limbs;
• Vision problems;
Indications
38
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
INDICATED IN
HYPERTENSION AND
FRONTAL HEADACHE
ALSO VERY EFFECTIVE FOR
ACUTE LUMBAR SPRAIN AND
CHRONIC LOWER BACK PAIN
22.07
下白
XIÀ BÁI
BELOW WHITE
22.07
22.06
Reaction area
of the kidneys and liver
• Same as 22.06.
Indications
1 cun proximal to 22.06.
Location
Combine with
22.06 – 中白 ZHŌNG BÁI
Needle 1 cun in depth.
Manipulation
39
STUDY NOTES ON MASTER TUNG'S ACUPUNCTURE
VERY GOOD IN
ST
